name: Robert Craft
abstract: Robert Lawson Craft (October 20, 1923 – November 10, 2015) was an American conductor and writer. He is best known for his intimate professional relationship with Igor Stravinsky, on which Craft drew in producing numerous recordings and books.

concerts.label: Igor Stravinsky and The Columbia Symphony Orchestra

works.t: Accompaniment to a Cinematographic Scene, Op. 34

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Marini
about_quotes.evidence: I remember years ago reading one of Robert Craft’s book about Stravinsky
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Marini interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 15, 2023
